seed_expert_discoveries.project: Codex Google Drive plugin and workflow memory
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: One-click install for Google Sheets integration with Codex; agents can reference past PRs/sessions to auto-update global agents.md with branch naming, commit styles, testing plans for faster iteration.
Deeply integrated system where AI writes majority of code in a multiplayer, manager-like workflow for teams; goes beyond RAG/Slack Q&A or OpenClaw to enable new enterprise deployment patterns.
Multiple code sightings of GPT-5.6 suggest imminent release possibly Thursday, expected as major capability boost.

global_discoveries.project: Tencent long-term memory system for agents
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Open-source 4-tier semantic pyramid (L0 raw logs to L3 persona) with Mermaid graph compression for tool logs; cuts tokens 61%, boosts long-horizon success 51%, fully local SQLite, integrates with OpenClaw/Hermes.
Systematic eval of 12 agent memory architectures shows no universal winner; success depends on matching memory structure to workload bottlenecks; includes GitHub repo with benchmarks.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Open-source temporal reasoning across memory layers with strategic prioritization for agents.
near_misses.reason: Mentions architecture innovation but lacks specific benchmarks or repo details in post.

notes: Limited high-signal technical posts in past 24h from seeds; focused on practical agent tooling and memory. Global search surfaced memory management as key theme. No major new repos/frameworks beyond memory systems.
